header: Start your accessibility review from stronger foundations
content:
Desiderio provides shared semantic structures, visible focus styles for its interaction patterns, and alternative-text fields for image content. Editors remain responsible for meaningful alternatives, a logical page-level heading hierarchy, and clear content.

Automated template checks reject inline styles and hardcoded colors, while contrast tests cover every theme preset in light and dark modes. Those checks help catch regressions; final WCAG 2.2 conformance still depends on your configuration, extensions, content, and testing with real users and assistive technology.
